Interface IsabelleHandler

All Known Implementing Classes:
BooleanOpHandler, BSumHandler, DefinedSymbolsHandler, FieldHandler, InfiniteUnionHandler, InstanceOperatorHandler, IntegerOpHandler, LogicalVariableHandler, NumberConstantsHandler, ObserverFunctionHandler, PolymorphicHandler, QuantifierHandler, SeqDefHandler, SortDependingFunctionHandler, UninterpretedSymbolsHandler
public interface IsabelleHandler
This class is a slightly adjusted version of SMTHandler. It largely has the same functionality.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static enum 
    IsabelleHandler.Capability
    An enumeration of the possible answers of a handler to the canHandle(Term) method.

  • Method Details

    • init

      void init(IsabelleMasterHandler masterHandler, Services services, Properties handlerSnippets, String[] handlerOptions) throws IOException
      Initialise this handler.

      This method is only called once after creation and before any other method is called.

      This method may also allocate additional resources that it needs for translation.

      Parameters:
      masterHandler - the MasterHandler coordinating the other handlers (including the one at hand)
      services - the non-null services object which is relevant for this handler
      handlerSnippets - the snippets loaded for this handler, null if no snippet property file is available for this handler
      handlerOptions - arbitrary options for the handler to take into account
      Throws:
      IOException - if resources cannot be read.

    • canHandle

      default IsabelleHandler.Capability canHandle(Term term)
      Query if this handler can translate a term.

      Test if this particular term can be translated. Usually this requires checking whether the toplevel operator of the term is in the list of supported operators, but the handler can also choose to use other aspects of the term to decide.

      Parameters:
      term - a non-null term to translate
      Returns:
      IsabelleHandler.Capability.YES_THIS_OPERATOR if this handler can successfully translate any term with the same toplevel operator, IsabelleHandler.Capability.YES_THIS_INSTANCE if this handler can successfully translate this particular term, IsabelleHandler.Capability.UNABLE if this handler cannot deal with the term.

    • canHandle

      boolean canHandle(Operator op)
      Query if this handler can translate an operator.

      Test if this handler can translate any term with the given argument top level operator.

      Parameters:
      op - a non-null operator to translate
      Returns:
      true if this handler can successfully translate all terms with op as toplevel operator

    • handle

      StringBuilder handle(IsabelleMasterHandler trans, Term term)
      Translate the given term into a StringBuilder.

      This method will only be called if canHandle(Term) returned true for the same term argument.

      The translation may add to the set of assumptions and declarations using corresponding calls to the IsabelleMasterHandler that it receives.

      Parameters:
      trans - the non-null master handler to which it belongs
      term - the non-null term to translate
      Returns:
      a StringBuilder containing the translation
